    "**These files are needed to generate cell lineage:**<br>\n",
    "\n",
    "**adatas of SNV:** Ratio and depth information of CMB * SNV in h5ad files<br>\n",
    "**adata of gene expression:** Gene expression h5ad files<br>\n",
    "**coor:** Original cell coordinate file with 3 columns (cell, x, y) and no header<br>\n",
    "**cmb_info:** Cell CMB group annotation with 2 columns (cell, group) and no header"
   ]
  },

    "ad_depth = ad.read_h5ad(\"Dataset1/unit_depth.h5ad\")\n",
    "adata = combine_ratio_depth(ad_ratio, ad_depth)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "67fb1714-0250-46f3-b4bb-21fb9f47a809",

    "Load spot coordinates and respective CMB labels"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "57e05c78-28e5-42bb-860b-b6f884119867",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "coor1 = pd.read_csv('../02.Tomato_callus/data/10x_data/10x_cells_coor.csv', header = None, names = ['cell', 'x', 'y'], index_col = 0)\n",
    "cmb_info1 = pd.read_csv('../02.Tomato_callus/data/choosing_alpha_for_CMB/10x_k_selection_result_weight0.80/27_mer/cellmetabin.csv', header = None, names = ['cell', 'group'], index_col = 0)\n",
    "coor1[['x','y']] = coor1[['x','y']].apply(pd.to_numeric, errors='coerce')\n",
    "df1 = coor1.join(cmb_info1, how='inner')\n",
    "cmb_agg1 = df1.groupby('group').agg(x_center=('x','median'), y_center=('y','median'), n_cells=('x','size')).reset_index()\n",
    "\n",
    "adata.obs = adata.obs.join(cmb_agg1.set_index('group')[['x_center','y_center','n_cells']], how='left')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "7d0f532f-d91b-4440-932d-47dbbf570748",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Obtain the PC elbow of gene expression profile"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "2a8d71ec-b795-4129-a462-4edacb8cfda2",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "5\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "adata1_exp = ad.read_h5ad(\"Dataset1/Gene_exp.h5ad\")\n",
    "adata1_exp.obs = adata1_exp.obs.join(cmb_info1, how=\"left\")\n",
    "\n",
    "adata1_MeanExp = group_meanexp_pca(adata1_exp, group_key=\"group\", do_normalize_log=True, do_scale=True, n_comps=22)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Detect elbow for CMB mean expression PCs\n",
    "explained_var = adata1_MeanExp.uns['pca']['variance_ratio']\n",
    "explained_var_cum = explained_var.cumsum()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Detect elbow point\n",
    "kl = KneeLocator(range(1, len(explained_var)+1), explained_var, curve=\"convex\", direction=\"decreasing\")\n",
    "elbow_PC = kl.elbow\n",
    "print(elbow_PC) #  PC elbow of gene expression profile"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d4207b98-fb42-4f89-b936-7e44037199bc",

    "adata1_SNV = filter_snv_by_depth_ratio(adata, min_tot_depth=20, min_mut_depth=5, min_mut_avg_ratio=0.1)\n",

    "sc.pp.pca(adata1_SNV)\n",
    "\n",

    "adata_joint = adata_snv.copy()\n",
    "adata_joint.obsm[\"X_snv_pca\"] = np.asarray(adata_snv.obsm[\"X_pca\"])\n",

    "\n",
    "w = build_joint_neighbors_graph_fusion(adata_joint,\n",

    "\n",
    "adata_joint.obs[\"group_cmb\"] = adata_joint.obs_names.astype(\"category\")"
